sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Ambev S.A. Gets February Lift From Brazil Beer Data as April Vote on Payout, Capital Increase Nears
feed.summary: Ambev S.A. is experiencing a short-term volume outlook lift due to new Brazilian beer production data for February, despite concerns about rising inventories and potential March output declines. The company is seeking to stabilize its main Brazil operations ahead of first-quarter earnings and continues to push forward with significant shareholder payouts, including dividends and a capital increase. Analysts are watching closely to see if early 2026 performance can offset ongoing cost and FX headwinds, while the company has also warned of potential increases in cash COGS per hectoliter for the year.

feed.title: Centri Announces Panel Topics and Featured Programming for Second Annual Capital Conference at Nasdaq on April 14
feed.summary: Centri Business Consulting has announced the panel topics and featured programming for its Second Annual Capital Conference, which will take place on April 14, 2026, at Nasdaq MarketSite in New York City. The conference will host over 500 investors, executives, and growth-stage company leaders to discuss key topics in capital formation, including AI infrastructure, nuclear energy, the IPO landscape, life sciences, digital assets, and capital markets regulation. The event will also feature company presentations and fireside conversations with growth-stage businesses.

feed.title: Applied Optoelectronics (AAOI) Climbs 20% on Higher 800G Transceiver Demand
feed.summary: Applied Optoelectronics Inc. (NASDAQ:AAOI) saw its share prices climb by 20.34% after announcing increased demand for its 800G data center transceivers. A major hyperscale customer upsized its order to $124 million, more than doubling the existing backlog for these transceivers, which are crucial for high-performance AI and cloud data center networks. Deliveries for the initial and new orders are expected to begin in Q2 2026 and be completed by the end of the year.

feed.title: [Form 4] EVEREST GROUP, LTD. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Everest Group, Ltd. director Alan Darryl Page reported acquiring 96 Common Shares as compensation under the 2003 Non-Employee Director Plan. These shares were granted in lieu of a cash quarterly retainer, valued at $325.28 per share, bringing his direct holdings to 2,013 Common Shares. The transaction, categorized as neutral in impact and sentiment, was filed on Form 4 with the SEC.

feed.title: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) CEO receives new stock awards
feed.summary: Stephen D. Steinour, President, CEO, and Chairman of Huntington Bancshares (HBAN), received additional common stock as compensation-related awards. On April 1, 2026, he acquired 6,809.783 shares directly and 541.621 shares through a 401(k) plan, both at $0.00 per share. These awards increased his direct holdings to 1,387,798.358 shares, with additional indirect holdings through various plans and trusts.

feed.title: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) DEI chief receives new stock awards
feed.summary: Huntington Bancshares' Chief DEI Officer and SVP, Donnell R. White, received additional common stock as part of his compensation. On April 1, 2026, he was granted 181.341 shares directly and 11.933 shares credited to the company's 401(k) plan, with no cash cost to him. Following these awards, White's total holdings increased to 26,343.467 direct shares and 1,257.980 shares indirectly held in the 401(k) plan.

feed.title: [Form 4] HUNTINGTON BANCSHARES INC /MD/ Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Richard W. Neu, a director at Huntington Bancshares Inc., reported stock-based awards rather than open-market trades. He directly received 1,614.815 shares of common stock at no cost, increasing his direct holdings to 479,005.134 shares, and indirectly acquired an additional 1,078.165 common shares through a Director Deferred Compensation Plan. These transactions, filed on a Form 4, are categorized as neutral in impact and sentiment by Rhea-AI Filing Summary, indicating routine compensation activity.

feed.title: Everest Group (NYSE: EG) director takes 96-share stock grant as quarterly retainer
feed.summary: Everest Group director Allan Levine received a grant of 96 Common Shares as his quarterly board compensation, valued at $325.28 per share. This stock award matches the value of the cash retainer he could have taken, aligning his remuneration with the company's share performance. Following this transaction, Levine directly holds 5,301 Common Shares in Everest Group.

feed.title: Andre Maestrini Buys 3,275 Shares of lululemon athletica (NASDAQ:LULU) Stock
feed.summary: Lululemon Athletica CEO Andre Maestrini recently purchased 3,275 shares of the company's stock, increasing his stake by 10.47% to a total of 34,551 shares valued at approximately $5.22 million. The acquisition occurred on April 1st at an average price of $151.02 per share, totaling $494,590. Lululemon also reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations with $5.01 EPS and $3.64 billion in revenue, although the stock currently trades near its 1-year low amid mixed analyst sentiment, industry headwinds, and a customer lawsuit.

feed.title: agilon health inc stock: Reverse Split Sparks Analyst Optimism
feed.summary: Agilon Health's recent 1-for-25 reverse stock split has led to increased analyst optimism and raised price targets, positioning the company as a potential investment in the value-based healthcare sector. Despite prior share price volatility and ongoing losses, the move is seen by some as a strategic reset to attract institutional investors and capitalize on the growing Medicare Advantage market. The company's model focuses on empowering primary care physicians with technology to improve patient outcomes and manage care costs.

feed.title: Sen. Warren probes rental housing industry for ‘predatory’ practices
feed.summary: Senator Elizabeth Warren is investigating the rental housing industry for alleged predatory practices, requesting detailed information from 14 major corporate landlords regarding their portfolios and rental policies. This scrutiny follows the recent passage of legislation that limits institutional investors from owning single-family homes, a move that the housing industry warns could backfire. Warren also highlighted concerns about tenant protections, maintenance costs, and algorithmic rent pricing, citing previous lawsuits and settlements against companies using such software to inflate rents.

feed.title: T-Mobile US, Inc. stock: Undervalued growth amid telecom shifts?
feed.summary: This article examines T-Mobile US, Inc. stock, positioning it as a potentially undervalued growth opportunity within the competitive U.S. telecom sector. It highlights T-Mobile's strong market position through customer growth, 5G leadership, and robust free cash flow, suggesting it could be attractive for North American investors seeking exposure to the wireless industry. The analysis also covers potential risks like intense competition, regulatory scrutiny, and debt levels, advising investors to consider these factors alongside positive analyst perspectives.

feed.title: Everest Group (NYSE: EG) director gets 96-share compensation award
feed.summary: Everest Group (NYSE: EG) director Howard John M received an equity compensation of 96 Common Shares on April 1, 2026. The shares were valued at $325.28 each, replacing his quarterly cash retainer under the 2003 Non-Employee Director Plan and in compliance with Rule 16b-3. Following this routine grant, Mr. Howard John M directly holds 2,257 Common Shares.

feed.title: Value-Based ETF ACVF Lands On NYSE Texas, Boosting Investor Access
feed.summary: The American Conservative Values ETF (ACVF) has expanded its market presence by dual-listing on NYSE Texas. This move aims to increase the fund's visibility and accessibility for both institutional and retail investors, aligning with Texas' pro-business environment and the growing demand for values-based investing strategies. ACVF will continue trading under its existing ticker on its primary exchange while benefiting from the added flexibility of the new listing.

feed.title: Mosaic, Simplot double down on phosphate CVDs, call for continuations and increases
feed.summary: The article from Michigan Farm News, an official publication of Michigan Farm Bureau, indicates that Mosaic and Simplot are pushing for the continuation and increase of countervailing duties (CVDs) on phosphate. The specific details regarding the CVDs and the reasons for their call are not provided in the snippet.

feed.title: Tax withholding trims Extra Space (EXR) CAO stake to 14,646 shares
feed.summary: Extra Space Storage Inc.'s Chief Accounting Officer, Grace Kunde, had 276 shares withheld by the company to cover tax liabilities on vested restricted stock awards. This transaction, valued at $132.49 per share, was a routine tax-related disposition and not an open-market trade. Following the withholding, Kunde directly holds 14,646 shares of Extra Space Storage common stock, reflecting a minimal impact on her overall equity stake.

feed.title: Equifax Credit Reporting Services: Essential Insights for North American Investors on Core Operation
feed.summary: This article provides North American investors with a detailed analysis of Equifax's credit reporting services, highlighting their importance in the financial ecosystem amidst economic volatility and regulatory changes. It covers the company's core offerings, strategic relevance in lending, technological innovations, and resilience against market challenges, positioning it as a steady investment option. The piece emphasizes Equifax's role as a cornerstone for lenders, businesses, and governments in assessing creditworthiness.

feed.title: Starbucks set to restart bargaining in April
feed.summary: Starbucks Workers United are set to restart contract negotiations with Starbucks in April after a nationwide strike that tapered off from December to February. The union submitted a comprehensive contract proposal including a $17 wage floor and annual raises, along with various protections for workers. This comes amidst ongoing unfair labor practice charges against Starbucks and shareholder activism regarding the company's labor relations.

feed.title: NetApp (NTAP) Valuation Check As New Cyber Resilience Alliances Attract Fresh Investor Attention
feed.summary: NetApp (NTAP) has partnered with Commvault and Elastio to enhance cyber resilience, focusing on ransomware detection and data recovery. Despite mixed short-term stock performance, the company shows strong long-term momentum and is considered undervalued by analysts at $117.93, above its current trading price of $103.35. Growth in its Keystone Storage-as-a-Service and increased deferred revenue support a positive outlook, though risks like higher component costs and weak demand in certain sectors remain.

feed.title: WW International, Inc. Announces Leadership Changes and CEO Search Following Executive Transition
feed.summary: WW International (Weight Watchers) has announced significant leadership changes following the departure of CEO Tara Comonte. An Office of the CEO has been established, led by CFO Felicia DellaFortuna and COO Jon Volkmann, to ensure operational continuity while a search for a new CEO is underway. A Transition Committee has also been formed by the Board of Directors to oversee the CEO search and enhance board governance.

feed.title: Genuine Parts (GPC) director receives 302 phantom stock units as compensation grant
feed.summary: Juliette Williams Pryor, a director at Genuine Parts (GPC), has been granted 302 phantom stock units as part of her compensation, which are economically equivalent to GPC common shares and will be settled in cash or stock. This grant increases her total phantom stock holdings to 4,333 units, including those acquired through the Dividend Reinvestment Plan. The transaction is a compensation award and not an open-market purchase or sale, with an indicated unit value of $103.52.

feed.title: CEO exits as Weight Watchers (NASDAQ: WW) reshapes board and bylaws
feed.summary: WW International (Weight Watchers) has announced significant leadership and board changes, including the resignation of CEO Tara Comonte and Chief Legal and Administrative Officer Jacqueline Cooke. An Interim Office of the CEO has been established, and the board has reduced its size and amended its bylaws to allow for fewer directors. Despite these transitions, the company reaffirmed its first-quarter 2026 subscriber estimates and full-year 2026 financial guidance.

feed.title: Alto Ingredients (ALTO) CCO has shares withheld to cover restricted stock taxes
feed.summary: Alto Ingredients' Chief Commercial Officer, James R. Sneed, had 22,265 common shares withheld at $4.79 per share to cover tax obligations upon the vesting of restricted stock. This was an automatic tax-withholding disposition, not an open-market sale. After this transaction, Sneed directly holds 440,926 shares of Alto Ingredients common stock.

feed.title: Alto Ingredients (ALTO) CEO has 73,062 shares withheld for taxes on vesting
feed.summary: Alto Ingredients' President & CEO, Bryon T. McGregor, reported a tax-related share disposition where 73,062 shares of common stock were withheld to cover withholding taxes upon the vesting of restricted stock. The shares were withheld at a price of $4.79 per share. After this transaction, McGregor directly owns 957,882 common shares of Alto Ingredients.

feed.title: Alto Ingredients (ALTO) COO has shares withheld to cover tax on vesting
feed.summary: Alto Ingredients, Inc.'s COO, Todd E. Benton, reported a tax-related share disposition where 25,359 shares of common stock were withheld at $4.79 per share to cover withholding taxes upon the vesting of restricted stock. This was not an open-market trade, and Benton retains a substantial equity position in the company with 184,130 shares after the transaction. The filing is categorized as moderate impact and neutral sentiment, clarifying it as a standard tax withholding event rather than a sale.

feed.title: Alto Ingredients (ALTO) CFO has 41,072 shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: Alto Ingredients, Inc. CFO Robert R. Olander reported a Form 4 transaction where 41,072 shares of common stock were withheld to cover taxes upon the vesting of restricted stock. This non-market tax-withholding disposition resulted in Olander directly holding 253,086 common shares afterward. The implied tax price per share for this transaction was $4.79.

feed.title: [Form 4] AEHR TEST SYSTEMS Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Didier Wimmers, Executive VP of R&D at AEHR Test Systems, acquired 1,873 shares of common stock at $6.6725 per share through the company’s Employee Stock Purchase Plan on April 1, 2026. This transaction increased his direct holdings to 16,059 shares, which includes unvested restricted stock units. The purchase was made under a tax-conditioned plan, exempting it from certain short-swing trading liabilities.

feed.title: 6 Largest Mainline Fleets In North America
feed.summary: This article ranks the six largest mainline airline fleets in North America, detailing the fleet size and strategic focus of each carrier. United Airlines secures the top position with 1,094 aircraft, followed by American Airlines (1,021), Delta Air Lines (996), Southwest Airlines (800), Alaska Airlines & Hawaiian Airlines (413), and Air Canada (222). The report highlights each airline's modernization efforts, fleet diversity, and operational strategies to dominate the North American skies and expand international presence.

feed.title: AMC Networks (AMCX) CFO exit effective; interim finance chief named
feed.summary: AMC Networks announced that CFO Patrick O’Connell's resignation became effective on March 31, 2026. His departure was not due to any disagreements regarding company operations or policies. Michael J. Sherin III, the Chief Accounting Officer, has assumed the responsibilities of principal financial officer on an interim basis to ensure continuity.

feed.title: Q1 2026 Newsletter: What Small Businesses Are Telling Us About The Economy
feed.summary: GoDaddy's Small Business Research Lab's Q1 2026 newsletter reveals that small business formation, especially digital entrepreneurship, is a strong indicator of economic health, often predicting GDP growth and employment changes earlier than traditional market data. The report highlights a significant rise in digital small business activity nationally, as shown by the GoDaddy Participation Index. It also includes updated microbusiness data for various countries and spotlights several news articles discussing the boom in entrepreneurship.

feed.title: Alico Stock Crosses 200-Day Average, Analysts Divided on Next Move
feed.summary: Shares of Alico, Inc. (NASDAQ:ALCO) have recently surpassed their 200-day moving average, a key technical indicator, leading to mixed reactions among Wall Street analysts. Some analysts recommend a 'sell' rating due to valuation concerns and operational challenges, while others maintain a 'hold' amidst the stock's upward momentum. Investors are keenly observing whether the stock can sustain this trajectory above the key technical level.

feed.title: Alnylam Pharmaceuticals (ALNY) Presents Vutrisiran ATTR-CM Data at ACC.26
feed.summary: Alnylam Pharmaceuticals (ALNY) recently presented new clinical data at ACC.26 regarding its cardiovascular portfolio, highlighting the benefits of vutrisiran for patients with transthyretin-mediated amyloidosis with cardiomyopathy (ATTR-CM). The data showed vutrisiran improved health-related quality of life and functional outcomes across various patient demographics. Additionally, the company shared positive Phase 2 safety data for zilebesiran, an investigational RNAi therapeutic for continuous blood pressure control.

feed.title: What's open and closed on Good Friday 2026? Stock markets, banks, post office, Walmart holiday hours
feed.summary: Good Friday, April 3, 2026, is an important Christian holiday, but it is not a federal holiday in the U.S., meaning many federal institutions remain open. However, several states recognize it as a state or partial holiday, leading to closures for state agencies. This article clarifies what institutions and businesses are open or closed on Good Friday due to this varied observance.

feed.title: TKO Group (TKO) Announces $1B Share Repurchase Initiative
feed.summary: TKO Group Holdings Inc. announced a $1 billion share repurchase initiative, comprising an $800 million accelerated share repurchase (ASR) agreement and a 10b5-1 trading plan for up to $200 million. These actions, stemming from a previously authorized $2 billion repurchase, are designed to enhance shareholder value through disciplined capital deployment. The ASR agreement involves an initial delivery of over 3.1 million Class A common shares and is expected to conclude in June, nearly exhausting the total authorization.

feed.title: United Way of Southern Tier reveals 2026 award winners. See list
feed.summary: The United Way of the Southern Tier announced its 2026 Community Award winners, celebrating local individuals and organizations at a dinner on April 30th at the Corning Museum of Glass. Honorees include John G. and Bobbie Ullman, Patty Howe, and Corning Credit Union for their significant community contributions. Corning Incorporated will also receive a special award recognizing its 175th anniversary.

feed.title: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. Reminds Investors That Class
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. is reminding investors that class action lawsuits have been filed against PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:PYPL) and REGENXBIO Inc. (NASDAQ:RGNX). The firm encourages investors in these companies to contact them to potentially serve as lead plaintiff. The lawsuits allege misleading statements and material omissions regarding financial outlooks and product development.

feed.title: Director Joanna Geraghty (NYSE: LHX) granted 123 phantom stock units
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies director Joanna Geraghty was granted 123.62 phantom stock units as part of her deferred compensation under the 2019 Non-Employee Director Compensation Plan. These units, valued at $353.91 each, include 11.33 units earned through dividend equivalents. Following this routine, non-cash acquisition, Geraghty now holds 4,880.29 phantom stock units, which will be settled in L3Harris common shares upon her departure from the company.

feed.title: Broadcom (AVGO) and Carahsoft Announce $970M BPA with DISA
feed.summary: Broadcom (AVGO) and Carahsoft Technology Corp. have secured a five-year, $970 million Blanket Purchase Agreement (BPA) with the Defense Information Systems Agency (DISA). This agreement aims to consolidate existing software contracts, providing uniform pricing and cost transparency for VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) and other critical infrastructure solutions across various Department of War agencies. The partnership is expected to enhance mission capabilities, reduce total cost of ownership, and support the deployment of Zero Trust security and AI applications.

feed.title: Conagra Brands (CAG) Q3 FY2026 Earnings: GAAP EPS $0.42 vs. $0.4
feed.summary: Conagra Brands reported its Q3 FY2026 earnings, exceeding revenue and GAAP EPS estimates with $2.8 billion and $0.42 respectively, but missed on adjusted EPS at $0.39. The company saw a return to organic net sales growth due to strong performance in its Frozen and Snacks businesses. Despite this, gross margins compressed due to cost inflation, and free cash flow decreased year-over-year, though net debt was reduced.

feed.title: Yum Brands names former Marriott executive to board of directors
feed.summary: Yum Brands has appointed Kathleen Oberg, former CFO of Marriott International, to its board of directors. Oberg retired from Marriott in March after a decade as CFO and brings a strong background in financial discipline and operational performance to Yum Brands. This move aims to strengthen the company's leadership with her extensive industry experience.

feed.title: Coca-Cola Beverages unveils America250 Commemorative Cans ​
feed.summary: Coca-Cola Beverages Florida has launched limited-edition "America250 Coca-Cola cans" to celebrate the United States' 250th anniversary. These commemorative cans, produced at the Jacksonville facility, will feature patriotic branding representing all 50 states and will be available starting April 6 across Florida. Coke Florida, a Signature Partner of America250, also plans community engagement initiatives throughout 2026 to support the national celebration.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy boosts grid performance for storm season
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy announced improved electric system reliability for its Indiana customers heading into storm season, with fewer and shorter outages in 2025 compared to previous years. These improvements are attributed to years of infrastructure investments and a grid modernization program. The company also provided tips for customers to prepare for severe weather.

feed.title: Green Century Funds Submits Shareholder Proposal to Skyworks Solutions
feed.summary: Green Century Funds has submitted a shareholder proposal to Skyworks Solutions, Inc., requesting the company to issue a report on how it plans to increase the scale, pace, and rigor of its greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions reduction efforts. This proposal was announced on April 3, 2026, and seeks disclosures beyond Skyworks Solutions' existing reports.

feed.title: ALLIENT (ALNT) VP Warzala has 1,544 shares withheld for taxes on vesting
feed.summary: ALLIENT INC's VP and Group President, Stephen Warzala, had 1,544 shares withheld at a price of $61.82 per share to cover tax obligations related to restricted stock vesting on April 1, 2026. This was a routine, non-market transaction for tax purposes, as confirmed by a Form 4 filing. After this event, Warzala directly holds 34,484 common shares, in addition to significant indirect holdings through various trusts and an ESOP.

feed.title: ALLIENT INC (ALNT) VP sees 1,055 shares withheld to cover tax on vested stock
feed.summary: Helmut Pirthauer, VP and Group President of ALLIENT INC (ALNT), had 1,055 shares of common stock withheld on April 1, 2026, to cover tax obligations from vested restricted stock. This was not an open-market sale but a tax-withholding disposition related to equity compensation. After this transaction, Pirthauer directly holds 44,998 shares of ALLIENT INC common stock.

feed.title: Allient (ALNT) CFO withholds 947 shares to cover tax on vesting
feed.summary: Allient Inc.'s CFO, James A. Michaud, reported a routine tax-related share withholding of 947 common shares at $61.82 per share to cover tax obligations on vesting restricted stock. This transaction is a compensation-related tax settlement and not an open-market sale. Following this event, Michaud directly holds 13,963 common shares and indirectly holds 113 common shares through an ESOP Trust.

feed.title: Genuine Parts (NYSE: GPC) director receives 242-share phantom stock award
feed.summary: Genuine Parts Co. (NYSE: GPC) director Richard Cox Jr. was granted 242 shares of phantom stock, each valued at $103.52 per share. This award increases his total phantom stock holdings to 5,323 shares. The phantom stock is economically equivalent to GPC common stock and will be settled in cash or common stock based on a prior deferral election, including 52 shares acquired via a Dividend Reinvestment Plan.

feed.title: A Look At Allegro MicroSystems (ALGM) Valuation After Sector Driven Move On Nvidia Marvell News
feed.summary: Allegro MicroSystems (ALGM) saw its stock move due to a sector-wide rally in semiconductors, rather than company-specific news, following Nvidia's partnership and investment in Marvell Technology. Despite shares trading at US$32.60, one valuation narrative suggests ALGM is 29% undervalued at $45.83, citing rebounding industrial automation and data center markets. However, a Discounted Cash Flow model pegs the stock as overvalued at $29.40, indicating mixed signals for investors.

feed.title: Las ETF que invierten en acciones de Spire Inc.
feed.summary: This article lists Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs) that invest in shares of Spire Inc. (SR), a gas distribution company. It provides a detailed table with information on each ETF including market value, weight of SR in the fund, issuer, management style, expense ratio, assets under management (AUM), price, percentage change, relative volume, and 3-year total return. The ETFs cover various investment styles such as passive, active, mid-cap, small-cap, value, growth, and high dividend yield, offering investors diversified exposure to Spire Inc.

feed.title: VolitionRX (VNRX) FY2025 Earnings: Q4 EPS and Revenue Not Disclo
feed.summary: VolitionRX Ltd (VNRX) reported full-year 2025 revenue of $1.7 million, a 40% increase year-over-year, alongside a 17% reduction in operating expenses and a 24% improvement in operating cash burn. Despite these operational improvements, the full-year revenue significantly missed analyst estimates of $9.82 million, and Q4 EPS and revenue were not disclosed. The company highlighted strategic progress in cancer and sepsis initiatives, including a first order for Nu.Q® Cancer assays and participation in a sepsis evaluation program, but an audit's "going concern" explanatory paragraph indicates ongoing reliance on external funding.
